bio-rsrogers.md

Lead Researcher

Return to Team

Background

I am a student at UCSD focusing on the intersection of data science and public infrastructure. For the DSC259 final project, I focused on the initial data ingestion and the missingness analysis.

Technical Contributions

  • Data Ingestion: Automated the pipeline for the Purdue Power Outage dataset.
  • Analysis: Performed permutation tests to determine if missing climate data was NMAR.
  • Visualization: Created the interactive plotly maps for the final report.

DSC259: Final Project

  • rsrogers@ucsd.edu
  • scotty-ucsd
